questionHtml: Use the model to predict how many edge pieces she had found when she had sorted a total of 750 pieces.
markschemeHtml:
valid approach     (M1)

eg  750 = x + y , edge + interior = 750

correct working     (A1)

eg  750 − x = 6.9298 x  + 8.807 , 93.4684

93 (pieces) (accept 94)     A1  N3

[3 marks]

meta.title: Use the model to predict how many edge pieces she had found when she had sorted a total of 750 pieces.
